channel.title: Biogas on en.ergie.at
channel.description: Recent content in Biogas on en.ergie.at

item.title: transpAIrent.energy
item.description: The project transpAIrent.energy – Transparent AI Forecasts for Green Energy in Austria aims to generate probabilistic real-time forecasts for energy system-relevant variables such as electricity prices and CO2 intensities in Austria using generative AI methods, and to develop a transparent platform that makes these forecasts publicly accessible.
